song.title: Pressed
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Pressed out of measure, Pressed beyond all length; Pressed so intensely, Seeming beyond strength;|| Pressed in the body, Pressed within the soul, Pressed in the mind Till darksome surges roll.
[C] Chorus God is my hope and God is my joy; He is the resurrection life I enjoy.
[V2] 2) Pressure by foes, And pressure from our friends; Pressure on pressure, Till life nearly ends;|| Pressed into knowing None to help but God, Pressed into loving Both the staff and rod.
[V3] 3) Pressed into liberty Where nothing clings, Pressed into faith For hard and hopeless things;|| Pressed into life, A life in Christ the Lord, Pressed into life, The life of Christ outpoured.
song.author: Annie Johnson Flint
